title: OREGON REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH PROGRAM ABORTION CARE - 211info
text: LILITH CLINIC OREGON REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH PROGRAM ABORTION CARE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides abortion care up to 28 weeks and 0 days into pregnancy, including pregnancy tests, and ultrasounds to confirm gestational age. Other services include STI testing for Gonorrhea, Chlamydia, and Trichomoniasis. 511 SW 10th Avenue Suite 904 Portland, OR 97205 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Office hours: Monday 9am-3pm, Tuesday-Thursday 9am-6pm Clinic days and surgical procedures: Friday-Saturday 8am-3pm. Clinic days may change during holiday weekends or for clinic's monthly Saturday closure. Email (503) 221-1870 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 221-1870 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment or for more information FEES: Varies by service. Accepts Oregon Health Plan (OHP), most private insurance, and offers limited financial assistance to cover cost of care or travel. Pregnancy tests: None DOCUMENTS: Photo ID is required LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Nationwide SITE HOURS: Monday 9am-3pm, Tuesday-Thursday 9am-6pm, Friday/Saturday 8am-3pm(clinic days) Clinic days may change during holiday weekends or for clinic's monthly Saturday closure. Services: Abortions Pregnancy Testing Sexually Transmitted Infection Screening * Chlamydia Sexually Transmitted Infection Screening * Gonorrhea Ultrasound Scanning If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. LILITH CLINIC
